title: Three blind mice
content:
Three blind mice, three blind mice,
        See how they run!
    They all run after the farmer's wife,
    And she cut off their tails with a carving knife,
    Did you ever see such a thing in your life
        As three blind mice!
meaning:
Helen Beatrix Potter's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Three blind mice"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
